commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
This may refer to either. (Calmet)
The Holy Spirit gives an encomium to Joiada, for re-establishing the divine worship, (Junius) or to Azarias, for withstanding the impious attempt of king Osias. (Estius; Tirinus) (2 Paralipomenon xxvi. 17. (Menochius)
